content:
Closing and Call to Action


- Caller: I'm glad to hear you're interested! I will send you an email right now with the Calendly link to book your consultation at your convenience, and the link for the downpayment. Once that's settled, we can dive deep into your specific needs and start crafting your marketing strategy. What email address should I send this to?

Thanking and Ending the Call


- Caller: Thank you, [Client's Name]. You will receive all the details shortly, and I look forward to our comprehensive session. Have a great day, and thank you for considering Ulti Tool Media as your partner in growth.

---

Follow-Up Email with Booking and Payment Links


---

Subject: Enhance Your Business's Digital Strategy with Ulti Tool Media

Dear [Client's Name],

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. It was a pleasure discussing how Ulti Tool Media can enhance your brand's presence and effectiveness online.
context: From document: Cold Call Script & Follow-Up Email — chunk 3 (chunk 3/6)
